heading: Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 86–694, § 274 Stat. 739Sept. 2, 1960
label: 291 to 295 Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 86–694, § 274 Stat. 739Sept. 2, 1960
notes: Section 291, , , established a commission to make recommendations for memorials and entombments for Arlington Memorial Amphitheater.act Mar. 4, 1921, ch. 169, § 141 Stat. 1440
Section 292, , , provided for a chairman and disbursing officer.act Mar. 4, 1921, ch. 169, § 241 Stat. 1440
Section 293, , , required specific Congressional authorization for erection of memorials and interments.act Mar. 4, 1921, ch. 169, § 341 Stat. 1440
Section 294, , , related to restrictions on inscriptions and entombments.act Mar. 4, 1921, ch. 169, § 441 Stat. 1440
Section 295, , , related to character of the inscription.act Mar. 4, 1921, ch. 169, § 541 Stat. 1440
Sections are covered by .section 295a of this title
